system_read.primary_failure_mode: Commercial execution breakdown despite structurally strong product economics

structural_truths: Product competitiveness appears strong relative to peers
Delivery-heavy execution model introduces scaling friction
Revenue expansion engine not compounding cleanly

existential_risks.name: Growth Engine Breakdown
evidence: Multiple sales reps near 0% quota achievement
existential_risks.impact: Revenue ceiling and stalled new logo velocity

existential_risks.name: Forecast Credibility Erosion
existential_risks.impact: Capital narrative and investor confidence risk

optimization_levers.name: Strong Software Economics Base
optimization_levers.note: Healthy gross margins provide recovery headroom

core_dissonances: Strong product positioning but weak commercial conversion
High delivery cost but low customer satisfaction
Aggressive growth ambition without funnel physics support
Revenue growth without corresponding cash realization

commercial_diagnosis.primary_issue: Execution gap rather than product gap

sub_drivers: High cost base not translating into experience

advisory_anchors: Growth problems are execution-led, not product-led
Fixing delivery efficiency unlocks both margin and retention
Forecast governance is a board-level priority
Working capital discipline is a near-term unlock
